race.comment: HEY BELLA (7) was building nicely to last start's victory at Stony Creek, well backed as favourite there and coming away to score by a length. She can at least hold her form and more likely improve which will see her hard to beat again. BOGUES (1) ran first up in a much stronger race in town. He struggled there but comes a fair way back in grade now and will be fitter. Rates well. KING ALLA (11) is racing consistently, just finding one better here last start. He'll be running on. MOVE THE TORANA (8) was good behind Finance Shogun last time which ties in HEY BELLA, respecting.
